### CAGR计算

**公式**: CAGR = (Ending Value / Beginning Value)^(1/n) - 1

```
CAGR = (1353.7 / 724.1)^(1/3) - 1
CAGR = (1.8695)^(0.3333) - 1
CAGR = 1.2330 - 1
CAGR = 0.2330
```

| 1951 | 3,120 |

**CAGR计算**:
$$\text{CAGR} = \left(\frac{3,120}{1,459}\right)^{\frac{1}{4}} - 1 = 2.1385^{0.25} - 1 = 0.2093$$
